mapper.sql: a.id as id ,a.chongdianzhuang_name as chongdianzhuangName ,a.chongdianzhuang_uuid_number as chongdianzhuangUuidNumber ,a.chongdianzhuang_photo as chongdianzhuangPhoto ,a.chongdianzhuang_types as chongdianzhuangTypes ,a.chongdianzhuang_zhuangtai_types as chongdianzhuangZhuangtaiTypes ,a.chongdianzhuang_kucun_number as chongdianzhuangKucunNumber ,a.chongdianzhuang_new_money as chongdianzhuangNewMoney ,a.chongdianzhuang_content as chongdianzhuangContent ,a.shangxia_types as shangxiaTypes ,a.chongdianzhuang_delete as chongdianzhuangDelete ,a.insert_time as insertTime ,a.create_time as createTime ,a.longitude as longitude ,a.latitude as latitude ,a.address as address
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM chongdianzhuang a WHERE a.chongdianzhuang_delete = 1 AND a.shangxia_types = 1 AND a.chongdianzhuang_kucun_number > 0 ORDER BY a.chongdianzhuang_zhuangtai_types ASC, a.chongdianzhuang_name ASC
